title: Grand Theft Auto V
shortDesc: Dive into the massive open world of Los Santos and Blaine County, following three unique protagonists as they navigate a life of crime. Experience thrilling story missions, dynamic events, and an expansive online multiplayer mode.

title: Forza Horizon 4
shortDesc: Enjoy the ultimate racing experience in a beautifully recreated open-world UK with dynamic seasons, over 450 cars, online multiplayer events, and hidden surprises.

title: Far Cry 5
shortDesc: Fight against a dangerous cult in rural Montana, explore vast landscapes, engage in first-person combat, and uncover hidden secrets in this action-packed open world.

title: God of War Ragnarok
shortDesc: Join Kratos and Atreus on an epic journey through Norse mythology, facing mythical creatures, cinematic storytelling, and breathtaking combat experiences.

title: Red Dead Redemption II
shortDesc: Experience the American Wild West as outlaw Arthur Morgan. Explore vast landscapes, engage in missions and side quests, and interact with a living world of characters and wildlife.

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
shortDesc: Play as Geralt of Rivia in a vast open-world RPG filled with rich storytelling, complex characters, and challenging combat. Hunt monsters, explore diverse landscapes, and uncover political intrigue.

title: Max Payne 2
shortDesc: Experience noir-style storytelling and bullet-time action as Max Payne navigates a dark world of crime, revenge, and intense firefights.

title: Assassin's Creed Odyssey
shortDesc: Embark on an epic journey through Ancient Greece as a mercenary, exploring a huge open world, battling legendary creatures, and uncovering the secrets of the Assassin's legacy.

title: Spider-Man: Web of Shadows
shortDesc: Swing through New York City as Spider-Man, facing the symbiote invasion, dynamic combat, and save civilians in this action-packed superhero adventure.

title: Cyberpunk 2077
shortDesc: Enter Night City as V, a mercenary in a cyberpunk dystopia. Customize your character, explore the vast open-world city, engage in deep narrative choices, and take on high-tech combat missions.

title: Left 4 Dead 2
shortDesc: Survive the zombie apocalypse with friends or AI companions. Battle hordes of infected in dynamic, fast-paced co-op campaigns full of intense action.

title: Alan Wake
shortDesc: Dive into psychological thriller storytelling as Alan Wake, a novelist uncovering dark mysteries in a small town. Solve puzzles, fight enemies, and explore atmospheric environments.

title: Assassin's Creed Valhalla
shortDesc: Lead Eivor, a fierce Viking raider, through England's dark ages. Raid, explore, and build your settlement in a massive open world.

title: Batman: Arkham City
shortDesc: Patrol Gotham as Batman, confront iconic villains, and solve intricate puzzles while enjoying deep combat mechanics in Arkham City.

title: Max Payne 3
shortDesc: Return as Max Payne in a gripping noir story full of bullet-time action, gritty shootouts, and a personal quest for redemption.

title: Far Cry Primal
shortDesc: Step into the Stone Age, hunt prehistoric beasts, tame animals, and survive as the last member of your tribe in a savage open world.

title: Ghost of Tsushima
shortDesc: Play as Jin Sakai and defend Tsushima Island from Mongol invaders using samurai combat, stealth, and a beautifully crafted open world.

title: Elden Ring
shortDesc: Explore a vast dark fantasy world, challenge formidable bosses, and create your own path in this action-RPG adventure.

title: Devil May Cry 5
shortDesc: Experience high-octane action with stylish combat, three playable characters, and a gripping demon-slaying story.

title: Watch Dogs
shortDesc: Hack into Chicago's city infrastructure, manipulate systems, and uncover conspiracies while playing as skilled hacker Aiden Pearce.

title: Sleeping Dogs
shortDesc: Go undercover in Hong Kong's criminal underworld, combining martial arts combat, gunfights, and driving in an open-world adventure.

title: World War Z
shortDesc: Team up in fast-paced co-op battles against massive zombie hordes across multiple global locations.
